title: [CI:DOCS] install.md: include distro package info links

comments.body:
> Thanks!
> 
> ACK at a first glance. I’ll actually _read_ the links later :)

the links point to all open bugs for the skopeo package for that particular distro. Let me know if it should be of some other form.

I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to suggest there was anything wrong with them, I was just about to leave the computer at that time.

The link destinations are perfectly fine.

@mtrmac ack, thanks for the suggestions, I can update those. I also need to add links to some other distros.

@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL too.
